examples.text: تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي جَعَلَ فِي السَّمَاءِ بُرُوجًا وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا سِرَاجًا وَقَمَرًا مُنِيرًا
examples.english: Blessed is He who has placed in the sky great stars and placed therein a [burning] lamp and luminous moon.

etymology.text: Derived from the passive participle of أَنَارَ (ʔanāra).

body.text: act. part. n. of 4: see 1. ―         -b2-  [Hence the saying,]

body.text_bw: lasota fiY h*aA AlA^amori bimuniyrK walaA muloHimK
body.text_ar: لَسْتَ فِى هذَا الاَمْرِ بِمُنِيرٍ وَلَا مُلْحِمٍ

body.text: Thou art not in this affair a commencer nor a finisher:
a person who will do harm nor one who will profit
